description: PR-mined: modeled after the real merged StreetComplete PR #6307 'Fix angle normalization with non-zero startAt parameter' (2025-06-06), which fixed the normalizeDegrees/normalizeRadians formulas and their docs. That fix is already baked into our pinned commit, so a literal forward-patch of the PR's own diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit continues the same file's real overload asymmetry: normalizeDegrees has both Double and Float overloads, but normalizeRadians only had Double -- this adds the missing Float overload.
